task_completion.description: Agent logs into the application and navigates to the 'Office Park Phase 1' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logged in (e.g., 'Logged in as admin' in the top right) and viewing the 'Office Park Phase 1' project dashboard.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the list of open issues/tasks for the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Issues' tab or page for the 'Office Park Phase 1' project, displaying a list of open tasks.

task_completion.description: High priority open tasks are updated to have an estimated time of 40 hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the issues list or individual issue views, tasks with 'High' priority show an 'Estimated time' of 40.0 hours.

task_completion.description: Normal priority open tasks are updated to have an estimated time of 16 hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the issues list or individual issue views, tasks with 'Normal' priority show an 'Estimated time' of 16.0 hours.

task_completion.description: Low priority open tasks are updated to have an estimated time of 8 hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the issues list or individual issue views, tasks with 'Low' priority show an 'Estimated time' of 8.0 hours.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface navigating the web application, rather than terminal commands executing API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard web UI elements for an issue tracker, and there is no evidence of the agent editing local HTML files or using a text editor to fake the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if visible, do not show SQL commands, rails console usage, or scripts modifying the issues directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project identifier is 'office-park-1'. The required time estimates for open issues are exactly: High priority = 40.0 hours, Normal priority = 16.0 hours, Low priority = 8.0 hours.
